title: Refined Storage - Quartz Arsenal
description: Quartz Arsenal is an addon for Refined Storage that adds various new tools.
body:
Quartz Arsenal is an addon for [Refined Storage](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/) that adds various new tools.

Currently, it adds:

* [Wireless Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/wireless-crafting-grid.html)
* [Creative Wireless Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/creative-wireless-crafting-grid.html)

## Wireless Crafting Grid

The Wireless Crafting Grid is a wireless version of the [Crafting Grid](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/viewing-resources/crafting-grid.html).

### Usage

To use the Wireless Crafting Grid:

- Bind it to a storage network by using it on any storage network device.  
- Ensure at least one [Wireless Transmitter](https://refinedmods.com/refined-storage/wireless-networking/wireless-transmitter.html) is installed in the storage network for connectivity.  
- Charge the Wireless Crafting Grid, as it consumes energy when opening the view, inserting, extracting or crafting a resource.

### Keybinding

An unbound keybinding is available to open the Wireless Crafting Grid.
